# How to build a brand that brings high-ticket buyers to you

A 60-minute keynote. 28 slides. Generate in this exact order.

Style: editorial print magazine. Big typography. Lots of white space. Near-black #0a0a0a, red #e90d41, off-white #f7f7f8. Headings in Rethink Sans Bold. Body in Inter. No emojis. No icons. No stock photos. Founder portrait only on slide 4.

Layout pattern: every slide has a tiny red ALL-CAPS eyebrow at the top (where noted), one big bold statement filling the middle, optional small silver caption at the bottom. Two-line stacks use near-black for line 1 and red for line 2.

---

**Slide 1 / Title**
Background: near-black
Hero: How to build a brand that brings high-ticket buyers to you.
Subtitle: Without becoming louder. Without becoming someone you're not.
Tag: Daniel Paul · 60 minutes · today
Accent: red dot top-right

---

**Slide 2 / The question**
Background: off-white
Hero: Why do some people charge $20,000 for the same hour someone else charges $200?
Highlight $20,000 in red
No subtitle. No image.

---

**Slide 3 / The frame**
Background: off-white
Line 1 (black): Today is not about getting more clients.
Line 2 (red): Today is about being the person they were already looking for.

---

**Slide 4 / Where I started**
Background: off-white
Layout: split. Left 50% text. Right 50% portrait panel.
Left: Broke. No team. No list. No credibility.
Right: moody desaturated founder portrait on near-black panel. Caption underneath: 2020. Charging $300 to build websites.

---

**Slide 5 / The crossover**
Background: off-white, centered
Line 1 (black): I stopped chasing clients.
Line 2 (red): I started building a brand.

---

**Slide 6 / The names**
Background: off-white
Eyebrow (red): SAME STAGE. SAME GREEN ROOM.
Three stacked names in massive black: Robert Kiyosaki / Mac Attram / Sandy Jadeja
Caption (silver): 18 months later.
Bottom anchor stat (red, bold): 2020: broke. 2026: $250,000 from a stage.

---

**Slide 7 / What I sold**
Background: off-white
Line 1 (black): I didn't have a better offer.
Line 2 (red): I had a better brand.

---

**Slide 8 / The lesson**
Background: near-black, centered
Hero: The brand walks in the room before you do.
Treatment: huge centered, off-white. This is the signature line.

---

**Slide 9 / What just happened**
Background: off-white
Eyebrow (red): AI · 2024 → 2026
Massive red stat: $50,000/yr → $20/mo
Caption (black): The price of a skill, today.

---

**Slide 10 / The bundling**
Background: off-white
Title: Skills are being bundled.
Three side-by-side black-bordered cards (0 radius, white fill):
1. Copywriting + research + design + editing + coding. One subscription.
2. One Claude agent does the work of five juniors.
3. Your competitor across the world has the same tools you do. For the same price. Today.

---

**Slide 11 / The collapse**
Background: off-white
Three stacked lines:
Line 1 (black): Anyone can copy your tone.
Line 2 (black): Anyone can copy your offer.
Line 3 (red): Anyone can copy your funnel.

---

**Slide 12 / The one thing left**
Background: near-black, centered
Hero: Trust is the most expensive asset of 2026.
Highlight "expensive" in red.

---

**Slide 13 / The framework**
Background: off-white, centered
Eyebrow (red): THE FRAMEWORK
Massive numerals: 1 · 1 · 1 · 1
Caption (silver): One platform. One year. One audience. One call to action.

---

**Slide 14 / Rule 1**
Background: off-white
Eyebrow (red): RULE 1 / 4
Line 1 (black): Pick one platform.
Line 2 (red): Stay for one year.

---

**Slide 15 / Why one platform wins**
Background: off-white
Top line (silver): 100,000 wrong followers.
Divider: 2px black line
Bottom line (black, huge): 1,000 right ones.
Caption: 1,000 right people will pay you more than 100,000 wrong ones.

---

**Slide 16 / Rule 2**
Background: off-white
Eyebrow (red): RULE 2 / 4
Line 1 (black): You don't have a content problem.
Line 2 (red): You have a quitting problem.

---

**Slide 17 / The honest timeline**
Background: off-white
Title: The honest timeline.
Three rows, each separated by a thin silver hairline:
Row 1: Months 1 – 3 → Invisible. (silver verdict)
Row 2: Months 4 – 9 → The algorithm finds you. (silver verdict)
Row 3: Month 10 onward → Inbound starts. (red verdict)

---

**Slide 18 / Rule 3**
Background: off-white
Eyebrow (red): RULE 3 / 4
Line 1 (black): Stop being useful to everyone.
Line 2 (red): Be unforgettable to one.

---

**Slide 19 / The mirror test**
Background: off-white
Massive red quotation mark in top-left corner
Quote (black): I write every post like it's a DM to one person. That's why the right one always replies.

---

**Slide 20 / Rule 4**
Background: off-white
Eyebrow (red): RULE 4 / 4
Line 1 (black): One ask.
Line 2 (black): Repeated quietly.
Line 3 (red): For one year.

---

**Slide 21 / What a great CTA sounds like**
Background: off-white
Two side-by-side cards (0 radius, white fill):
Card 1 (black border): eyebrow silver OFF, body "DM me to learn more."
Card 2 (red border): eyebrow red ON, body "Comment OPTIMIZER and I'll send you the tool."

---

**Slide 22 / Why the four ones work**
Background: off-white
Line 1 (black): Repetition is not boring.
Line 2 (red): Repetition is recognition.
Caption (silver): Same person. Same platform. Same audience. Same ask. For one year.

---

**Slide 23 / Monday morning version**
Background: off-white
Eyebrow (red): WHAT THIS LOOKS LIKE
Massive stat (black): 2 hrs / week.
Sub (black, smaller): From your phone. No team. No agency.

---

**Slide 24 / The cadence**
Background: off-white
Title: Three posts a week. Same window.
Row of seven equal square boxes (2px black border, 0 radius):
Mon → outlined, silver "—"
Tue → red filled, off-white "POST"
Wed → red filled, off-white "POST"
Thu → red filled, off-white "POST"
Fri → outlined, silver "—"
Sat → outlined, silver "—"
Sun → outlined, silver "—"

---

**Slide 25 / The content stack**
Background: off-white
Eyebrow (red): FOREVER STACK
Three side-by-side cards (2px black border, 0 radius, white fill):
Card 1: eyebrow red "TUE", title "Story", body "One thing that happened to you this week."
Card 2: eyebrow red "WED", title "Lesson", body "One sharp thing you learned doing your work."
Card 3: eyebrow red "THU", title "Asset", body "One thing you can give away for free."

---

**Slide 26 / The gift**
Background: off-white
Eyebrow (red): FROM ME TO YOU
Line 1 (black): Your LinkedIn profile is the storefront.
Line 2 (red): Most of you left the door locked.

---

**Slide 27 / The URL**
Background: near-black, centered
Eyebrow (red): $1,000 LINKEDIN PROFILE AUDIT
Massive URL (off-white): linkedinprofile.purelypersonal.ai
Sub (silver): Free. Forever.
QR code bottom-right: links to https://linkedinprofile.purelypersonal.ai/
Caption next to QR (off-white): Scan. Or open it on your phone now.

---

**Slide 28 / Last frame**
Background: near-black, centered
Hero (off-white): The brand walks in the room before you do.
Sub (silver): Start building yours tonight.
